title: Why AI Agents Forget—and How to Fix Their Context
titleCandidates: Why AI Agents Forget Even With Longer Prompts
Give AI Agents High-Signal Context for Long Tasks
AI Agent Context Engineering for Reliable Work
description:
AI Agents do not fail only because information is missing. Long histories, raw tool output, repeated instructions, and stale decisions can bury the signal needed for the next step. This video shows how to manage a finite attention budget and build a reusable six-part high-signal context pack.

What you'll learn:
- Choose high-signal instructions, tools, and canonical examples
- Retrieve detail on demand without losing the current goal
- Preserve decisions, progress, and boundaries across long tasks

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
00:58 Attention Budget
02:53 High-Signal Inputs
04:41 Retrieve on Demand
06:26 Long-Horizon Memory
08:15 Context Pack
09:59 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent. Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.
